description: Legal record (#105) in a court register/pinqas from a Karaite beit din in Cairo (on f. 35r of Yevr.-Arab. I 328). Dated 27 Kislev [5326 AM] (1565), with the year listed as the same from previous entries on the same folio. Agreement between ex-spouses following the issuance of the bill of divorce on the same day. Ibrahīm b. Yehuda ha-Rofe acknowledges that, following his divorce with Ḍara(?) () bt. ʿAbd al-Maqṣūr al-Kohen, he does not have any outstanding legal claims against his ex-wife. Likewise Ḍara(?) appears before the court and she releases her ex-husband from paying her delayed dowry and other legal claims related to her ketubba. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
